name: AskNicely

hero.heading: Gapflow and AskNicely
hero.subheading: Automate customer feedback collection and NPS tracking

documentation.title: Getting Started with AskNicely
documentation.description: Connect AskNicely to Gapflow and automate customer feedback collection with NPS, CSAT, and CES surveys.

documentation.title: Survey Automation
documentation.description: Learn how to automate survey distribution via email and SMS based on customer events and triggers.

documentation.title: NPS Best Practices
documentation.description: Master NPS tracking and feedback analysis with proven patterns for customer experience improvement.

tutorials.title: Automate Post-Purchase Surveys
tutorials.description: Build workflows that automatically send NPS surveys to customers after purchase completion and track responses.

tutorials.title: Multi-Channel Survey Distribution
tutorials.description: Create intelligent workflows that distribute surveys via email and SMS based on customer preferences.

tutorials.title: Real-Time Feedback Processing
tutorials.description: Set up webhooks to capture survey responses in real-time and trigger actions based on NPS scores.

faqs.question: How do I connect AskNicely to Gapflow?
faqs.answer: Use your AskNicely API key to securely connect to Gapflow. Navigate to Integrations, select AskNicely, and enter your credentials from your AskNicely account settings.

faqs.question: Can I send surveys via both email and SMS?
faqs.answer: Yes! AskNicely supports both email and SMS survey distribution. Choose the channel based on customer preferences or use both for maximum reach.

faqs.question: How do I automate survey sending?
faqs.answer: Connect AskNicely actions to triggers like CRM events, support ticket closures, or scheduled intervals. Gapflow automatically sends surveys when conditions are met.

faqs.question: Can I import contacts in bulk?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Use the Bulk Add action to import multiple contacts at once and optionally send surveys immediately or schedule them for later.

faqs.question: How do I track NPS, CSAT, and CES scores?
faqs.answer: AskNicely automatically tracks these metrics. Use webhooks to capture responses in real-time and sync scores to your CRM or data warehouse.

faqs.question: Can I trigger actions based on survey responses?
faqs.answer: Yes! Set up webhooks to receive survey responses and use conditional logic to trigger alerts, create tasks, or update records based on feedback scores.

testimonials.quote: Automating AskNicely surveys transformed our customer experience program. We now capture feedback at every touchpoint.
testimonials.author: Jennifer Martinez

testimonials.quote: NPS tracking is seamless. Every support ticket closure triggers a survey automatically and scores sync to Salesforce.
testimonials.author: Robert Thompson

testimonials.quote: We increased survey response rates by 40% using multi-channel distribution. Email and SMS automation is incredibly powerful.
testimonials.author: Lisa Wong

testimonials.quote: Real-time feedback processing lets us address low scores immediately. Customer satisfaction improved dramatically.
testimonials.author: James Peterson

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: AskNicely API rate limits depend on your subscription plan. Gapflow automatically manages throttling and queuing for reliable operation.

limits.title: Bulk Import Size
limits.description: Large contact imports can be processed in batches. Gapflow handles pagination automatically for optimal performance.

limits.title: Survey Frequency
limits.description: Respect customer preferences and avoid survey fatigue. Use conditional logic to limit survey frequency per contact.

limits.title: SMS Credits
limits.description: SMS surveys consume credits based on your AskNicely plan. Monitor usage and set up alerts when credits are running low.

relatedQuestions: How to handle low NPS scores?
